title: Include File Name
text: Include File Name Name of the header ( .h ) file for the C component. If not specified, the default name uo_ ComponentName .h is generated. This field is case-sensitive. Description To generate the header file and vector tables that contain the stub code for the C component, compile the component from the command line using the /sto switch. Applies To Signature Implementation (C) Related Links /sto Export interface definitions to integrate call-in from various types of middleware, or generate Java files for Java call-in, or generate C call-out stub code.
